titleStmt.title: SII 26.353: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 353. (A.R. No. 334 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Vīrarājēndra-chōḷadēva: Kulōttuṅga III: Year Lost: C. 12th-13th century.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the end, so the date and some other important details are lost.

It records a gift of a nandā lamp to the temple of the god Tiruvi[ṟkōlamuḍaiyanāyaṉār] of Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in [Jaya]ṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Attiyūrāḻvāṉ Āṇḍapirān of Gārggya-gōtra, belonging to Kōṭṭūr in Ambar-nāḍu in the same maṇḍalam. It is stated that he endowed some amount (details lost) of Anṟāḍu Naṟpaḻaṅkāśu for this purpose, and that the amount was accepted by a number of Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had agreed to burn the lamp perpetually from the month of Māśi of the year quoted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi munṉuṭaittāka tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājendracoḻa devaṟku
ṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattuk kūvamāna tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiru vi
coḻamaṇṭalattu Ampar nāṭ(ṭ)ṭu koṭṭur gārggyan Attiyūrāḻvāṉ Āṇṭapirān paṭṭaṉ pakkal Ikkoyilil civappirā
ṟ peṟṟān mahādevapaṭṭanum gautaman Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāna tavarājarājabhaṭṭaṉum tampimārum gautaman tiruvil
kāśyapan tevarāna poṟkoyil nampiyum tampimārum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvāṇṭai mācimāsam
yūrāḻvān Āṇṭapirān paṭṭan pakkal poliyūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa Anṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu
kaikkoṇṭu Oru tirunantāviḷakku Ahorātram candrādittavaṟ celuttak kaṭavomānom Ivvaṉaivom
neṟpeṟṟān mahādevabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai gautaman Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāna tavarājarājabhaṭṭan Eḻut
tiruvalamuṭaiyān bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai kāsyapan tevarāna poṟkoyil nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ikkoyil
śrīmāheśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 26.353 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
